title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited:
Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
